findings.title: Whitespace-only HMAC secret bypasses required-secret check in startServer
findings.detail: In src/server.ts line 55-56, `if (!secret)` is truthy for a whitespace-only string such as `'   '`. An operator who accidentally sets IFLEET_HMAC_SECRET to spaces would pass the guard, causing signPayload/verifyPayload to use a near-empty secret that could be brute-forced. The fix is to trim before the guard.
findings.fix_sketch: Trim the secret before checking: `const secret = (env['IFLEET_HMAC_SECRET'] ?? '').trim(); if (!secret) throw new Error('IFLEET_HMAC_SECRET is required')`

findings.title: Unsafe JSON.parse cast in readCostLog allows NaN cost totals in summarizeCosts
findings.detail: src/utils/costs.ts line 49 casts `JSON.parse(line) as CostRecord` without validating that `totalCostUsd` or `durationMs` are numbers. A corrupted or hand-edited line that omits those fields causes `summarizeCosts` to silently produce NaN for grandTotalUsd, breaking budget tracking downstream. The cast should be guarded.
findings.fix_sketch: After parsing, validate required numeric fields: wrap in a helper that returns `null` for malformed records and `.filter(Boolean)` the result before returning from readCostLog.

findings.title: Silent swallow of postChannelMessage error loses observability on Discord side-effects
findings.detail: src/queue/sources/discord.ts line 150 catches postChannelMessage failures with `.catch(() => {})`, discarding the error entirely. While the call is intentionally best-effort, PM2 log rotation may silently bury the failure. Adding a warn log preserves debuggability without changing behavior.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace `.catch(() => {})` with `.catch((err) => console.warn('[discord-source] postChannelMessage failed:', err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)))`
